## Testing

<!--
How did you validate this change? Include commands you ran and any
relevant environment (cluster type, broker version, OS).
-->

- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./... -tags=integration` (if integration paths touched)
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` (or relied on CI)
- [ ] Manual verification against a real cluster (describe below)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] I signed off my commits (`git commit -s`) confirming the DCO
  (https://developercertificate.org/)
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant (README, docs/, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or production data included
